name: Spam Vegetable Soup with Cheese-Topped Croutons
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3- or 4-quart saucepan, sauté carrots and onion in oil over medium heat for 5-10 minutes, or until the onion is golden.
2. Stir in broth, cabbage, potatoes, and thyme. Bring to a boil.
3. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 30 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in SPAM. Simmer for 2 more minutes.
5. Meanwhile, preheat the broiler.
6. In a small bowl, combine Swiss cheese, mayonnaise (or salad dressing), Parmesan cheese, and sliced green onions.
7. Spread the cheese mixture evenly over each slice of bread.
8. Pour the soup into oven-safe bowls. If your bowls are not oven-safe, place bread slices on a baking sheet and broil them for 1 minute, then transfer to the soup.
9. Top each bowl with a bread slice.
10. Place the bowls on the baking sheet and broil for 3 minutes, or until the cheese mixture just begins to brown.
